Destination_prior_probabilities.description: Prior probabilities of the wheelchair user's intended destination based on previous trips: D (door), S (straight), T (table)

Joystick_straight_likelihoods.description: Conditional probabilities of the user pointing the joystick straight given each intended destination: P(J|D)=0.30 for door, P(J|S)=0.40 for straight, P(J|T)=0.05 for table
